name: Dark Rum Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate and heavy cream in a bowl until smooth.
2. Stir in the dark rum and lime juice, then refrigerate until set.
3. Melt the chocolate and coat the chilled ganache mixture.
4. Refrigerate the coated truffles again to set them.
5. Once set, dip each truffle into the melted chocolate coating.
6. Garnish with slivered lime peel before serving.
